branding.title: Your brand, Your store, Your way.
branding.subtitle: Create stunning websites and grow your online presence with our intuitive platform designed for Egyptian businesses.

about.title: About SiteCraft
about.subtitle: SiteCraft is a low-code e-commerce platform designed specifically for Egyptian small businesses and regional brands, offering a comprehensive solution that combines ease of use with powerful features.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower small businesses and regional brands in Egypt with an accessible, feature-rich e-commerce platform that bridges the gap between global solutions and local market needs.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the leading e-commerce platform for small to medium-sized businesses in Egypt, providing innovative solutions that drive digital transformation and economic growth.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: We believe in making e-commerce accessible to all, providing excellent local support, and maintaining high standards of security and reliability.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose SiteCraft?
whyChoose.description: SiteCraft stands out by addressing the unique challenges faced by Egyptian businesses in the digital space. We offer local payment integration, high-quality Arabic translation, and competitive pricing tailored to the local market. Our platform combines the power of modern e-commerce tools with the simplicity of a low-code interface, making it accessible to businesses of all technical skill levels.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Born from a graduation project at Cairo University's Faculty of Computers and Artificial Intelligence, SiteCraft was developed by a team of passionate students who recognized the need for a localized e-commerce solution. Our platform is the result of extensive research, market analysis, and collaboration with local businesses to understand and address their specific needs.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.description: We are committed to continuous improvement and innovation, regularly updating our platform with new features and enhancements based on user feedback. Our dedicated support team ensures that every business owner has the resources and assistance they need to succeed in the digital marketplace.

features.subtitle: Everything you need to create and grow your online store

templates.title: Templates & Customization
templates.description: Choose from a variety of templates and customize every aspect of your store, from colors and fonts to layouts and buttons.

hosting.description: Worry-free hosting with top-tier security and reliability for your online store.

payments.description: Support for multiple payment methods including ValU, Meeza, MasterCard, and Fawry.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Efficiently manage products, track stock levels, and import products from external sources.

support.title: 24/7 Customer Support
support.description: Access to comprehensive help resources, email support, and knowledge base.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Real-time insights into sales, visitor behavior, and business performance metrics.

arabic.title: Arabic Translation
arabic.description: Full Arabic language support for enhanced accessibility and local market reach.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: Streamlined order processing and fulfillment tracking system.

receipts.title: Receipt & Policies
receipts.description: Customizable receipts and easy management of business policies.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: Tools to manage customer relationships and track purchase histories.

pricing.subtitle: Choose the perfect plan for your business. No hidden fees, no surprises.
